title: thesium fruticulosum
intro: Thesium fruticulosum, also known as woolly thyme or fruticose thyme, is a perennial herb belonging to the Thymelaeaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Thesium fruticulosum include reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Thesium fruticulosum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and reduce stress.
